title: iron apple
description: a mod that adds iron apples and enchanted iron apples to the game
body:
a mod that adds iron apples and enchanted iron apples to the game

 they can be crafted

with 8 iron ingots and 1 apple to make a iron apple 

and with 8 iron blocks and 1 apple to make a enchanted iron apple 

the iron apple gives you 1:40 minutes of absorption 1

and the the enchanted iron apple gives you 3:20 minutes of absorption 2

iron apples they are weaker than golden apples However they are less expensive to make
